title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates techniques for implementing persistent memory in AI agents. The video covers approaches to enable agents to retain and recall information across interactions.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates techniques for adding persistent memory to AI agents, focusing on how an agent can retain and recall information across separate interactions. The video addresses memory systems and context management, the components that determine whether an agent carries state forward or resets each session. The practical takeaway is a set of approaches for building agents that remember prior context rather than treating every exchange as isolated.
